name: wacsa-uitm
description: An automated car service advisor web application for Perodua vehicles, powered by Gemini AI.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Your Google Gemini API key for the AI chatbot feature.

FRONTEND_URL.description: The public URL of your deployed Heroku app (e.g. https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com). Used for CORS.

NODE_ENV.description: Node environment. Set to production on Heroku.
